CREATE TABLE numbers (id INT, value INT);
SELECT value % 2 AS modulo_result FROM numbers;
SELECT id, value, value % 3 AS remainder FROM numbers WHERE value > 5;
SELECT n1.id, n1.value % n2.value AS modulo_result FROM numbers n1 JOIN numbers n2 ON n1.id <> n2.id;
SELECT n1.value AS num1, n2.value AS num2, n1.value % n2.value AS modulus FROM numbers n1, numbers n2 WHERE n1.value > 0 AND n2.value > 0;
WITH mod_values AS (SELECT value % 5 AS mod_val FROM numbers) SELECT AVG(mod_val) FROM mod_values;
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (id INT, num INT);
SELECT n.value, m.num, n.value % m.num AS result FROM numbers n JOIN more_numbers m ON n.value > m.num;
SELECT (SELECT SUM(value) FROM numbers) % (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers) AS total_mod;
SELECT id, value % (SELECT MAX(value) FROM numbers) AS relative_mod FROM numbers;
SELECT value, (value % 10) + (value % 3) AS combined_mod FROM numbers;
SELECT CASE WHEN value % 2 = 0 THEN 'Even' ELSE 'Odd' END AS parity, value FROM numbers;
